programme.title: Botched: Foreign Bodies

programme.title: Botched: Totally Waist-ed
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a man who just wants his ears back, and Dr. Dubrow hopes to fix a botched butt implant. Afterward, the doctors meet with a woman who has had 17 surgeries to look like the perfect pixie.

programme.title: Botched: Supa Fupa
programme.desc: Terry operates on a cancer survivor whose gynecologist did her tummy tuck, Paul performs a reconstructive rhinoplasty on a woman who's been teased about her nose since childhood, and a Brazilian human seeks the doctors' help for botched chest implants.

programme.title: Botched: The Boob Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: A drag queen seeks Dr. Dubrow's expertise to rejuvenate his old breast implants (and career). Meanwhile, Dr. Nassif tackles a severe nose deformity, and later, the doctors meet a woman who wants to blow up her butt!

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Botched: Pinched Perfect

programme.title: Botched: Went to Mexico and Got Terrible Rhinorrhea
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a mother of three out of a snotty situation, while Dr. Dubrow transforms a woman whose ex-boyfriend pressured her to get extremely large implants. Later, we meet a man from Kentucky who wants the King of Pop's infamous nose.

programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Botched: Short Changed at the Nipple Bank
programme.desc: A transgender woman who got her rhinoplasty in Mexico seeks Dr. Nassif's help to fix her collapsed nose. Then, Dr. Dubrow tackles a botched double mastectomy, and a young woman travels from the UK to look faker than fake.

programme.title: Botched: J-Cup Juggernaut
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif transforms a woman whose nose has been stuck at a '7 o'clock' angle, and Dr. Dubrow helps a patient get her groove back by fixing her man-boobs. Later, a woman comes from across the pond for help with her J-sized breasts.

programme.title: Botched: All Twerk and No Play

programme.desc: Extra-large areolas force a sugar baby with 1600cc breasts to consult with the doctors. They also help a clumsy wife finally feel deserving of her husband by tacking her tricky nose.

programme.title: Botched: Silicone Slip-Ups
programme.desc: Ravaged by a flesh eating disease, a young woman needs help to save what's left of her breasts while a southern woman wants her witchy nose gone. A world famous drag queen seeks help for some silicone slip ups.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 3

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 4

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament Finale: Judgment Day

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Beach House in Kill Devil Hills, NC
programme.desc: A husband who adores the Outer Banks has doubts about whether his family can afford a beachfront home there. However, mom is determined to prove that, with enough rental income and the right price, they can buy what they always wanted to.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Getting the Family Together in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: Two sisters and their husbands search for the perfect vacation home in the Gulf Shores area of Alabama. With seven kids between them, it may be tricky to find a property with not only enough space, but also an affordable price tag.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Bringing Southern Charm to Vieques, Puerto Rico
programme.desc: We follow families as they leave the mainland behind and head to the Caribbean to live.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Bringing the Family Home

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Empty Nesting in Tampa
programme.desc: A couple was about to become empty nesters before he accepted a high-profile CEO position that will move them from Denver to Tampa. They have just three days to find a house that's perfect for entertaining clients before his position starts in six weeks.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Joining the Force in Mesa
programme.desc: The pressure is building for a couple that's moving to Mesa, AZ, with their two kids so he can start police academy training in just three weeks. When they enter a bidding war for their top choice, they must scramble to find a solution.

programme.title: Home Town: The Move of a Lifetime

programme.title: Home Town: Colourful Custom Cottage
programme.desc: Ben and Erin create a stunning kitchen and garden for a restaurant owner.

programme.title: Good Bones: Tiny House, Huge Transformation
programme.desc: A very small house poses big problems for Mina and Karen.

programme.title: Good Bones: Facelift for a Tiny Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen buy a tiny, Victorian-style home in need of a serious facelift. Not only is the house small, it has a funky layout with non-functional spaces, forcing the girls to build an addition on the back while trying to stay on budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Bugging Out on Budget
programme.desc: Mina and Karen reach outside of their comfort zone with a house on the edge of the Bates Hendricks neighbourhood.

programme.title: Good Bones: Making Space in the Suburbs for a Large Family
programme.desc: A couple asks Mina and Karen to help make space in their suburban home for big family gatherings.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Structure Worth Saving
programme.desc: Mina and Karen bought their latest house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood for only $4,500. When they see inside, they soon realize why it was so inexpensive.

programme.title: Good Bones: Starting From Scratch in the Southside Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take a stab at redeveloping a house that was hit by a car in the Old Southside neighbourhood. After some fun demo with a giant water hose, they design their new house with a simple, urban and classic aesthetic.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life for a Growing Family

programme.title: Home Town: Can This House Be Saved?

programme.title: Killing Eve: Management Sucks
programme.desc: Eve and Carolyn are reeling. Eve strikes up an unlikely alliance with Kenny's colleagues at the Bitter Pill. Villanelle finds that management isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld
programme.desc: A vampire warrior finds herself falling in love with a human who has been bitten by a werewolf, the sworn enemies of her clan.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Evolution
programme.desc: A werewolf and a vampire, forbidden lovers, attempt to unlock the secret behind their tribes' feud.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Rise of the Lycans
programme.desc: Lucian, a young Lycan, becomes a powerful leader among the slave Lycans. He plans a rebellion against the vampires' rule with the support of his secret lover and vampire, Sonja.

programme.title: Killing Eve: Management Sucks
programme.desc: Eve and Carolyn are reeling. Eve strikes up an unlikely alliance with Kenny's colleagues at the Bitter Pill. Villanelle finds that management isn't all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: The amazing life story of the most famous elephant to have ever lived: Jumbo. With scientists from around the world, Sir David has unique access to the elephant's skeleton at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Port Protection: Eyes of the Forest
programme.desc: Port Protection’s residents must adapt to the will of the forest and the sea to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Port Protection: New Blood

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Port Protection: Dark Days

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Port Protection: Blood and Snow

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Friends With Benefits
programme.desc: Prostitution, promiscuity and post-coital cannibalism are par for the course when sex-crazed animals become friends with benefits.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer get a handle on their dogs to maintain their happy households.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs
programme.desc: Cesar stops by the motor home of NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick and his wife DeLana to help get their Chihuahua, Lo, in line before they welcome their first child.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Horrible Hounds of the UK
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the United Kingdom to help troubled dog owners and their less-than-proper pooches.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: London Calling!
programme.desc: Cesar's next adventure in the UK starts on the wrong side of the law. Sally has a mixed breed pooch, Herbie, who was taken to court and put on trial for his life. Now Herbie must always be muzzled in public.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol'r Plunge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol braves the icy cold water like a polar bear for charity.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Charles in Charge
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his wife go away on vacation leaving the staff the man the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Baby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: A Great Dane is adopted.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pigs in a Blanket
programme.desc: Cold temperatures present the staff with challenges keeping the animals warm.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Up to the Tusk
programme.desc: A reindeer herd depends on Dr. Oakley as she examines two breeder bulls.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monsters of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The center of the Milky Way is home to strange and deadly phenomena that we don't yet understand, but using the latest science, experts are revealing how the supermassive black hole our galaxy's core shapes life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there, but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena that can be found in deepest reaches of the cosmos.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Hubble: Thirty Years of Discovery
programme.desc: For thirty years, NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has discovered new alien worlds, black holes, and the age of the universe itself. NASA astronauts reveal the secret history of the life-or-death missions to keep this complex machine working.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: The Inca capital of Cusco was said to be the site of untold gold and riches, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the secrets behind this mighty empire's fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Last Dance
programme.desc: Two armed and masked intruders barge into a family home demanding money, and threaten to kill the children. The police search for one of the suspects - an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Let the Helicopter Take Him
programme.desc: The helicopter in the sky becomes useful when the team traces a wanted drug dealer driving in the area.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chinatown Takedown
programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Family Secret
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez meets a young woman who alleges that her uncle sexually molested her after a family barbecue.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?
programme.desc: A cheerleader vanished from Blanchester in 1996 and her boyfriend was convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: Free to Murder Again
programme.desc: The case of Kenneth McDuff, the most infamous sexual predator in Texas history, sent to death row for three murders.

programme.title: Nightwatch: We Give Thanks
programme.desc: Titus and Dan resuscitate an overdosing drug user just before all hope is lost; Brooke and Landon tend to a young girl with congenital heart issues; a team of fire fighters contain a fire before it can wreak havoc.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: On Holy Saturday morning, one day before Sister Margaret Ann Pahl's 72nd birthday, she is viciously murdered in the chapel where she works. Police mount an investigation that will unearth the shocking lies and sadistic secrets leading to her death.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Christina Woods was reported missing by her mother Mary. Detectives uncover a complicated web involving Christina's husband Troy, her best friend Brooke and Brooke's husband Dan. Her body was found 600 miles away.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: Four young women attacked, only one survivor; Maureen Maher has been on the trail of serial killer Michael Gargiulo for more than a decade. Learn how she helped crack one of the cases.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper on Trial
programme.desc: The story of Michael Gargiulo, a serial killer known as 'The Hollywood Ripper.' Michael is accused of killing three women, and attempting to kill another who lived to bear witness against him.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Christina Woods was reported missing by her mother Mary. Detectives uncover a complicated web involving Christina's husband Troy, her best friend Brooke and Brooke's husband Dan. Her body was found 600 miles away.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Football Fatale
programme.desc: Star Washington Redskins safety Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive...

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: A young woman working at a convenience store is abducted from behind the counter in the middle of the night. She becomes the first of three women in the small town to disappear under shockingly similar circumstances.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Lifetime of Questions
programme.desc: As a 4-year-old girl, Heidi Jones discovered her mother's lifeless body on the living room floor. As an adult she guides police on a relentless quest to find her mother's killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Rocky Mountain Mystery
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears on a cold night in Breckenridge Colorado, one of the state's darkest mysteries begins.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Last Night Before Murder
programme.desc: A young mother inexplicably disappears in the middle of the night only to be found savagely murdered the next morning.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Life Halted
programme.desc: When a young woman is savagely murdered in her own home, police and her family must find the clue hidden inside the blood-stained crime scene that will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: History Repeats Itself
programme.desc: When a young mother vanishes her trail goes cold. Until a shocking discovery reveals that history repeats itself.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love in Flames
programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Accident
programme.desc: High school baseball coach Russell Stager is only separated from his wife for a few months when he meets Barbara. But less than a decade later, marital bliss will be replaced with a web of lies and betrayal that will push someone over the edge.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Big League Murder
programme.desc: Tommy and Tamara Kane appear to have it all. He's a pro football player for the Seattle Seahawks; she's a devoted mother living in Montreal. Distance keeps this couple together, but when Tommy's career ends, the proximity will tear them apart.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Watery Grave
programme.desc: Jeff and Jeanine Glanda have a picture-perfect family until selfishness and a shameless affair mark the beginning of the end. As money troubles and the threat of divorce breed paranoia and hate, a plot is hatched in the dark heart of a twisted killer.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Dallas Stoudemire: The Hero of El Paso
programme.desc: Lawlessness runs rampant in a notorious Texas outpost and it's up to legendary lawman Dallas Stoudenmire to tame the town known as 'Hell' Paso.

programme.desc: Finance expert, Suze Orman, offers tools needed for personal finances and life's must-have documents.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Stubborn as a Mule
programme.desc: The builders save a barn that once housed mules in the iron-mining boomtown of Low Moor, VA. As they work, they find evidence of the barn's industrial past. Later, Mark visits a timber frame that's been converted into a wedding venue.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Piece En Piece
programme.desc: The builders learn some new skills when Mark Bowe buys a cabin with a strange design called Piece en Piece.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: The Wife Runs the Reno
programme.desc: Denver natives are searching the city for a larger home for their family of four. He bought their current home before meeting his wife, so she thinks it's her turn to get what she wants.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: An Underground Renovation

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet Cinnamon Roll Waffle to the hearty and delicious Breakfast Poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best of the Midwest
programme.desc: From seriously saucy barbecue sandwiches to nachos on a pizza and the perfect burger for Dirty Dancing, these restaurants serve up some of the best dishes in America's heartland.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat, Drink, Play
programme.desc: Great food calls for great entertainment, and these places offer spectacles that make memorable side dishes to incredible meals, from Tex-Mex meatballs fueling music fans in Dallas to a comedy show featuring fresh Atlantic seafood in Maine.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Awards Show Party
programme.desc: Tia invites her assistant over to watch a red carpet awards show. They get dressed up, walk their own red carpet and snack on Stuffed Mushrooms, Caprese Salad Skewers, Chocolate Mousse and a Champagne Pear Cocktail.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Beach Picnic
programme.desc: Tia Mowry has decided she's ready for some fun in the sun, and she's packing a picnic for her and her friend Jules at the beach.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Blind Date
programme.desc: Tia Mowry is turning the cameras on one of her producers and setting him up on a blind date.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Pajama Party
programme.desc: Tia Mowry's not even getting out of her pajamas to cook today; she's having friends over for some girl time and an old fashioned sleepover, where she makes herbs de Provence popcorn and roasted sweet potato wedges.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Pizza Goes Healthy
programme.desc: Tia Mowry starts her day at one of her favorite neighborhood pizza places, where she orders up two amazing pizzas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: It's All Relative
programme.desc: Tia's aunt Blondie and cousin Jerome come over to share family stories while Tia and Cory cook up some impressive Caribbean-inspired dishes. Tia and Cory make a family secret curry chicken and potatoes as well as seafood paella.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch Bites Across Europe
programme.desc: Bobby prepares a menu of European-inspired small bites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Impress Your Guests
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay demonstrates how to prepare a jaw-dropping brunch without breaking a sweat.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Vermont Bed and Breakfast Style
programme.desc: Bobby creates a Vermont-style Bed & Breakfast menu with popovers and scrambled eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Marrakesh Express Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases the amazing spices and flavors of Morocco with this mouth-watering brunch. His menu includes: oatmeal with honey toasted apricots and pistachios; Moroccan eggs with flatbread and goat cheese.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Ill Gotten Grains
programme.desc: Take a look at the non-traditional grains couscous, wheat berries and bulgur.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle II: Fresh Pastai
programme.desc: Ravioli; Tortellini.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.desc: Tom faces the fight of his life aboard HMS Exeter, while Harry and Lois have a more personal battle to fight.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Baptiste
programme.desc: Julien makes a shocking discovery about the true identity of Edward Stratton.

programme.title: Classical Stretch: The Esmonde Technique: Zero Impact Cardio
programme.desc: This zero impact cardio workout will get your blood flowing without stressing your joints.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The T-Ball Problem/ The Bus Problem
programme.desc: Peg’s T-Ball Team, the Mighty Nine, have no chance against a team of Aliens all-stars -- Unless Peg can use the Aliens’ T-ball cards to predict where they’ll hit.

programme.title: Cyberchase: Fortress of Attitude
programme.desc: Hacker decides that he can force cybersites to surrender by annoying them. He broadcasts his loud and obnoxious voice across the vastness of cyberspace from a massive statue shaped like the arrogant Hacker himself.

programme.title: SciGirls: Turtle Mania
programme.desc: SciGirl Annie and her friends make a local wetland more attractive to turtles.

programme.title: Nova: Chinese Chariot Revealed
programme.desc: For over 1000 years, chariots thundered across China’s battlefields–dominating warfare longer than anywhere else on earth. Now, a series of amazing archaeological findings enable a team of experts to reconstruct and test China’s first super-weapon.

programme.title: History Detectives: Japanese Cane, Revolutionary Telescope & I.W. Baker's
programme.desc: Mysterious Japanese characters are engraved on a cane found in a World War II relocation camp. An unusual wooden telescope may be traced back to the Revolution era. A drawing of eight pound gold nuggets is investigated.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: The Cross and the Crescent
programme.desc: Gates charts the ancient rise of Christianity & Islam, whose economic & cultural influence stretched from Egypt to Ethiopia. Learn of African religious figures like King Lalibela, an Ethiopian saint, and Menelik, bringer of the Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Airplane
programme.desc: Take to the sky with the dreamers whose work gave humans the ability to fly. From Leonardo da Vinci’s 'flying machines' to the modern commercial plane, without these inventions, we may have never left the ground.

programme.title: Nova: Chinese Chariot Revealed
programme.desc: For over 1000 years, chariots thundered across China’s battlefields–dominating warfare longer than anywhere else on earth. Now, a series of amazing archaeological findings enable a team of experts to reconstruct and test China’s first super-weapon.

programme.title: The Woman in White
programme.desc: Laura is forced to set aside her love for Walter and marry Sir Percival, whose character takes a dark turn. Marian finds herself drawn to his enigmatic friend, Count Fosco.

programme.title: Boss: The Black Experience in Business
programme.desc: Trace the lives of African American entrepreneurs over 150 years, from those bound by bondage to moguls at the top of million-dollar empires.

programme.title: Reconstruction: America After the Civil War
programme.desc: Experience the aftermath of the Civil War — a bewildering, exhilarating and terrifying time. African Americans who had played a crucial role in the war now grapple with the terms and implications of Reconstruction and their hard-won freedom.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Start Digging
programme.desc: When the team finds the body of a widowed, single-mother, they are shocked to discover that the victim was in constant contact with Voight's now-reformed son, Justin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: Great athletes and electrifying performers from the world of sports entertainment.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Brave New Bellas

programme.title: Modern Family: Marco Polo
programme.desc: The Dunphys move into a cramped hotel room while their house is getting treated for mold, which Phil sees as an opportunity to spend some quality time together, but Claire and the kids are less than enthused.

programme.desc: Even though Halloween is Claire's holiday, she allows Phil to take over this year so instead of her usual fright-fest theme, he decides to turn the house into AwesomeLand.

programme.title: Modern Family: Queer Eyes, Full Hearts

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Spoils of War
programme.desc: After learning that Special Agent Kensi Blye disappeared and the Taliban may be holding her captive, Hetty sends the team to Afghanistan on a rescue mission.

programme.desc: Lucy is eager to contribute to a fashion show featuring the wives of motion picture stars.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include actress Danielle Fishel and singer Ally Brooke. Actress Renee Lawless also stops by and cooks a cheesy onion cracker casserole.

programme.title: Movie: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her wish. She has a glimpse into her future which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined.

programme.title: Movie: Bound and Babysitting
programme.desc: A woman is forced to baby-sit with her college nemesis and begins to see him in a new light.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Proposal

programme.title: Awkwafina Is Nora From Queens: Grandma Loves Nora
programme.desc: Nora competes with Edmund for their grandmother's affection, and Wally creates an Instagram account to impress his crush.

programme.desc: When Stanley snaps at Michael during a meeting, Michael tries to give him an attitude adjustment. Meanwhile, Dwight buys Andy's car and Pam deals with an unexpected inconvenience after spending the night at Jim's.

programme.title: The Office: Job Fair

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 20, 2020

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.desc: When a renowned doctor pays a visit to Seattle Grace-Mercy West Hospital as a patient the staff are surprise to discover that one of their own is related to the legend.

programme.desc: When Alex's younger brother, Aaron, shows up at Seattle Grace-Mercy West with a hernia, it's up to Alex to get Bailey's approval for his pro bono surgery. Matters are further complicated when Alex's past secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: How Insensitive
programme.desc: Bailey preps the team with sensitivity training prior to admitting a 700-pound patient with compounded medical issues and the case proves to be challenging in every sense. Meanwhile, Derek comes face to face with a wrongful death disposition.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Shiny Happy People
programme.desc: An elderly patient admitted into the E.R. for a heart condition sees a familiar face, a long lost love that happens to be in the E.R. as well for a fractured arm, and the staff find themselves caught up in their love story.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Death and All His Friends

programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Meet Virginia
programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: 35 to 1
programme.desc: The Memphis family loads up their cars and heads to Battlefield Dragway in Mississippi for one of JJ's famous arm-drop competitions. Thirty-five small-tire-car racers begin round one in this exclusive event, but only one will take home the grand prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: The Memphis Tea Party
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The MSO gets a callout from the Fox-Body Mustang drivers from Massachusetts and technical difficulties make it hard for the Memphis crew to get one up on the competition.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: School Is in Session
programme.desc: A client wants a school bus that can drive over sand and water.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Arctic Quest
programme.desc: A monster storm stands between the Time Bandit and their final offload. And on the Northwestern, a maniacal skipper heads into arctic seas to hunt down the planet's most elusive crab.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: False Pass
programme.desc: A white knuckle passage stands between the Time Bandit and their final offload.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: When Hell Freezes Over
programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie runs aground and Skipper Phil has to make another massive repair. On the winter crab grounds, the Skippers face a massive ice storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: We're Not in Kansas Anymore
programme.desc: Days of ice bashing have an entire fleet in pain. Meanwhile on the Northwestern, the exhausted crew struggles to keep up with Captain Sig's maniacal pace and one deckhand pays the price in blood.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Glory Days
programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie gambles on the Bering Sea's most difficult fishing grounds and the Time Bandit is in emergency mode with a starboard list. Meanwhile, a boat calls the Coast Guard for a man suffering from a heart attack.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Darkened Seas
programme.desc: A Coast Guard helicopter attempts a rescue in dangerous seas. The Time Bandit becomes treacherous with heavy blocks of ice falling on it and the Cornelia Marie's skipper's son reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Hard Living
programme.desc: The captains and crew recount some of their most harrowing times at sea. A skipper on the Cornelia Marie paid a heavy price for his hard living ways. Captain Johnathan left the Time Bandit for warmer waters.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Mission Critical
programme.desc: Phil Harris' critical illness at sea creates a dilemma for his sons. Phil was flown to Anchorage for treatment. One son stayed by his side, while his son, Josh, stayed with the boat to meet his crab quota -- then has to decide if and when to abandon ship.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Grind it Out
programme.desc: The captains and crew reflect on some of the tensions that rise at sea. By the middle of the season, captains turn on deckhands and deckhands turn on each other. On the Time Bandit, Mike Fourtner faltered on deck and his crewmates tore him apart.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Epic Storm
programme.desc: The Time Bandit has faced hard times at sea. Mike and Scott fought for the Captain's chair. In an effort to leave the deck, Edgar Hansen trained his greenest deckhand on the hydros.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: The captains and crew have faced rough seas and trying times, but losing Captain Phil Harris was a devastating event. His eldest son Josh had to break the news to the fleet, and the reactions were intense and unforgettable.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Mayday
programme.desc: Captains and crew discuss some of their most tumultuous times at sea. For Josh Harris, it was painful to return to the Cornelia Marie after his father Phil passed. The Opilio season ended with a distressing mayday call.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Karine has a big decision ahead of her. Larry has an important question for Jenny. Cortney worries about the future as she leaves Spain. Darcey and Jesse share an emotional goodbye, and Sean returns to Haiti to see if Abby has kept her promise.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Tangled Trouble

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Backcountry Christmas

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Fishy Waters

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: On the Prowl

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Fortifying the Homestead

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Back Breaking Work
programme.desc: The Kilchers are in the midst of an extremely ambitious and dangerous move in order to preserve their ancestral home. The risk is realized when one family member is sent to the hospital with a serious injury.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Christmas on the Frontier

programme.desc: Take a walk in the paws of the Rottweiler, the Boston terrier, the Basset Hound, the Shar-Pei, and the St. Bernard. Get a dog's eye view at the incredible bond shared by people and their pups.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Spirit House Retreat
programme.desc: A writer in Rhinebeck, NY calls on Pete to build a hideaway to embrace her creativity. Pete transforms an old cedar tree into a gold-leafed Spirit House retreat filled with uplifting oddities and a loft to rest the brain if she hits a writer's block.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sky High Spa
programme.desc: An entrepreneur from Austin, Texas hires Pete to a spa treehouse on her ranch. Pete faces plumbing challenges and builds an extravagant spa with a steam shower and a Japanese soaking tub.

programme.title: Tanked!: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Courtship of the Jaguars
programme.desc: Mr. Parsons the chameleon is about to meet new mate. Jaguars Napo and Goshi are being encouraged to mate, but Napo doesn't seem to be interested. Young giraffe Murchison faces the great outdoors. Nandita the 18-month-old elephant has a surprise.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Tia's son Kanani, and his fiancée M2, prepare for their wedding. Parolee Jammall finds an abandoned dog and asks Mariah for help rescuing it. Plus, a mother and son visit Villalobos hoping to find a new friend for their family dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: The family of Mutt, an employee who recently passed away, meets the dog that he chose for them. A stray near a middle school leads Tia and M2 on a wild good chase. And, Lizzy and Moe tackle the challenging task of renovating the dog agility course.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Giving Thanks to the Wolfpack

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Resistance

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: The Farm

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Home Pt.1

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Final Cut
programme.desc: Intent on improving relations between the civilian fleet and the military, Roslin and Adama offer a Fleet News Service reporter unlimited access to the Galactica officers and crew.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: After sending one more dilapidated Viper to the scrap heap, Tyrol vents his frustration by attempting to build a plane from salvaged parts.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Resurrection Ship Part 1

programme.desc: As President Roslin nears death, Dr. Gaius Baltar must be groomed for the worst case scenario. Roslin orders the death of Sharon's unborn child. A sabotaged Viper leads to an investigation that uncovers a movement of people seeking peace with the Cylons.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Black Market
programme.desc: President Roslin's quest to end rampant black market trading sparks violence and an investigation that reaches deep into military, civilian and government circles.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Scar

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Sacrifice

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: The Captain's Hand
programme.desc: Apollo assists in the search for a missing Raptor team as the new commander of the Pegasus grows increasingly unstable.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Downloaded
programme.desc: The conquerors of occupied Caprica hail two "heroes of the Cylon", who both resist their new celebrity.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Lay Down Your Burdens Part 1

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Lay Down Your Burdens Part 2

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Occupation & Precipice

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Exodus Part 1

programme.title: Manzo'd With Children: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chris and Albie attempt to open a lavish new restaurant at the Meadowlands Race Track, but quickly learn the space isn’t big enough to accommodate their vision. Albie’s new girlfriend, Brittany, meets the family for the first time.

programme.title: Manzo'd With Children: Brothers and Sisters
programme.desc: After Albie tells his sister Lauren that he doesn't want to have a relationship with her, Caroline gives them 24 hours to make peace with each other. Al Sr. strikes a deal to market a line of sauces based on Caroline's family recipe, but she is unsure.

programme.title: Manzo'd With Children: In Your Cafface!
programme.desc: Caroline struggles to come to terms with Albie continuing to date Brittany and has to decide if she will welcome her into the family. Plus, Lauren decides to remodel Cafface and turn it into a blow-out bar without asking for Caroline's permission.

programme.title: Manzo'd With Children: Secret Sauce
programme.desc: In an effort to perfect her soon-to-be launched BBQ sauce, Caroline and her family head down to Texas for a family vacation filled with BBQ meat, shots of whiskey and cowboys.

programme.title: Manzo'd With Children: Tattoo Nightmare
programme.desc: Caroline works with a design firm to create the label for her BBQ sauce line. Albie grows frustrated with Brittany and debates whether or not to break up with her. He considers getting a tattoo in an effort to break away from what's expected of him.

programme.title: Manzo'd With Children: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Caroline and Al Sr. decide to spend their 30th anniversary touring the Hudson River on their brand new boat. Albie struggles with his relationship before getting some motherly advice from Caroline.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Welcome to SUR
programme.desc: A new employee at SUR has a hard time overcoming gossip about her past.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: This Is a Break-Up
programme.desc: Lisa enlists the help of her SUR staff to celebrate Gay Pride with a parade float, but when Stassi catches Scheana and Jax flirting, the fighting and fallout threaten to ruin the day. Jax attempts to get his relationship with Stassi back on track.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: You Don't Know Jax
programme.desc: After the blow up at the Gay Pride event, Lisa struggles to keep the staff's personal conflicts outside of SUR. At a photo shoot, Kristen has an awkward encounter with someone from Tom's past. Meanwhile, Jax makes a bold play to win back Stassi.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Vegas With a Vengeance
programme.desc: The SUR staff heads to Las Vegas for Stassi's birthday and leaves Lisa very short handed at the restaurant on her busiest night, but Scheana stays back to make sure things run smoothly. Stassi uninvites Jax so she spends the weekend with her new man.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: I'm Not a Bitch
programme.desc: Upon Stassi's return to SUR, Jax has started dating one of her friends, and Katie and Kristen have turned against her. When Lisa calls a staff meeting to put a stop to the infighting, Laura-Leigh explodes on Stassi for sending her bullying texts.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Caught With Your Trousers Down
programme.desc: When Jax and Laura-Leigh are caught having sex in SUR's bathroom and Frank insults a customer, Lisa is forced to crack the whip on her staff, resulting in a firing. Stassi thinks her life is back on track when she makes up with her old friend Katie.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: In Love With Someone Else
programme.desc: When Lisa threatens to fire Stassi for neglecting her responsibilities at SUR and as a writer for Lisa's website, Stassi must plead to keep her jobs. Scheana has an emotional breakdown at work when Lisa forbids her to work a party Brandi is attending.

programme.title: MysteryQuest: Hitler's Escape
programme.desc: The official record states that Hitler committed suicide in his underground bunker at the end of WWII, but no body was ever produced and people believed he was still alive until new evidence surfaced that proved he was killed.

programme.title: Nazis on Drugs: Hitler and the Blitzkrieg
programme.desc: The story of a World War II Nazi scheme to provide methamphetamine to German soldiers to make them invincible. This vast conspiracy is sourced right from rare historical records secured by the Allies after the war.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: The Hunt Begins
programme.desc: Armed with 700 pages of recently declassified FBI documents, twenty-one year CIA veteran Bob Baer and war crimes investigator Dr. John Cencich begin a worldwide investigation into what happened to Adolf Hitler at the end of WWII.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: Secret Nazi Lair
programme.desc: Tim Kennedy, US Army Special Forces, joins archeologists Philip Kiernan and Daniel Schavelzon to explore a mysterious Nazi complex deep in the jungles of Argentina. The site yields a trove of Nazi artifacts.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: Escape From Berlin
programme.desc: Expanding their investigation as to how Adolf Hitler could have escaped Berlin under siege.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: The Tunnel
programme.desc: Finding a never before discovered tunnel leading from Hitler's bunker directly to Tempelhof Airport where Hitler's personal plane awaited.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: Ratlines
programme.desc: Lenny and Gerrard go to Spain where they investigate a monastery that could have been a hiding place for the Nazis and uncover an eyewitness that places Hitler living in those very walls. Further investigation uncovers a Nazi plane landing nearby.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: Hitler's Safehouse
programme.desc: The Canary Islands, where secret tunnels and a massive German compound may have supplied everything from weapons to a medical facility.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler: Friends in High Places
programme.desc: Hitler's potential next moves in Argentina, where a close confidant of the Fuhrer operated a mysterious hotel.

programme.title: Movie: To Have and Have Not

programme.title: Movie: Now, Voyager

programme.title: Movie: Gentlemen Marry Brunettes

programme.desc: When everyone prepares for the upcoming camp tournament, The Kikiwaka Cup, Zuri, captain of the campers team, is confident that they’re finally going to win against the counselors.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Toilets and Tiaras
programme.desc: Zuri hosts a beauty pageant at Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Bungle in the Jungle
