programme.desc: Viewers determine the guilt or innocence of Brian Eftenoff, who is accused of killing his wife.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood Brothers: The Derek and Alex King Case
programme.desc: Witness the shocking story of how two young Florida boys were led to kill their father.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, a man is shot by someone he trusts and Kim and Audrey must wait until the gunman is apprehended before they can begin treatment.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Back from the Brink
programme.desc: Baton Rouge paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife. Gunshots fired in Yonkers send Ariel and Cunningham to save a man down. In Austin, first responders plead with a patient to go to the hospital.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Dead Ringer/ My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Neighbours always mix up sisters Sarah and Stevie, but their polar-opposite personalities is what set them apart in the end. Elena and Christina were both adopted, but these teenage sisters love, laugh, and battle like blood relatives.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a deeper look at the case and uncover new information relevant to the trial.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Chandra Levy
programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Retiree Alex Strategos moves to Florida to be closer to his son, but loneliness consumes him. He turns to internet dating and finds 69 year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2007, young mother Melissa Flores vanished without a trace. Seven years later, police arrested her ex, Ronnie Denny Jr. Even though her body was never found, Denny was convicted of murder, but his family is convinced the system got it wrong.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2007, young mother Melissa Flores vanished without a trace. Seven years later, police arrested her ex, Ronnie Denny Jr. Even though her body was never found, Denny was convicted of murder, but his family is convinced the system got it wrong.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Bad Seeds
programme.desc: Robert and Stephen Spahalski are identical twins that terrorized upstate New York: one twin was put behind bars for murder and the other became a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Jeckyll and Hyde
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda looks for answers in the death of Calvin Blair, a young man stabbed and left for dead on the roadside; when Alexandra Drake is shot in the face, she manages to tell police it was accidental but Kenda isn't so sure he believes her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Time Bomb
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes at the Pikes Peak National Bank, it's up to rookie detective Joe Kenda catch the culprits.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped. Then Kenda is nearly stumped when a group of teens discover human bones on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: Blood evidence is used in investigating the shooting death of a firearms enthusiast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda's only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition. Then a 29-year-old man moves back to Colorado Springs, but at his welcome home party he winds up shot execution-style.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow. Then a man is murdered in an onslaught of high caliber gunfire, but an unexpected break turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. When the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A popular army vet is found bleeding to death on the cold asphalt of a shadowy parking lot -his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. A gruesome clue leads Kenda's team to an unlikely killer whose motive for murder is as heartless.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Friends Like This
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down outside his home after a day spent helping friends move apartments. Sgt. Joe Kenda and Det. John Anderson must determine whether the killer was a complete stranger, a barrio gang member, or a jealous lover.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it's up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Zoot Suit Riots
programme.desc: In pre-war America street gangs were on the rise. California media stirred up panic about young Mexicans and Latinos. When WWII began, racial tensions increased and they were quickly portrayed as a significant threat, leading to a racial boiling point.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill it's Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Mediterranean Oasis
programme.desc: Allen and Lily's uninviting yard is haggard and ignored, so Matt comes to their rescue with a Mediterranean oasis design. They want a place to hang out with friends and family so Matt gives them a large deck with a reclaimed dining table.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rock Pond Living Space
programme.desc: A dirt pile of a backyard with an old shed and dying plants is transformed into an entertainer's dream. An unused space quickly becomes everyone's hangout when a cascading rock pond takes center stage.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Hamptons Hangout
programme.desc: This dark and uninviting yard has these homeowners staying indoors. Mark delivers a design that will allow them to live outdoors. He installs a multi-tiered deck with dining table, a patio with a fire pit and sofa, as well as beach seating and a bar.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Modern Party Pad
programme.desc: The team transforms a barren patio space into a modern hangout. What was once a deck and dirt landscape gets a modified shade structure, steel water feature, living wall and bocce court. We add green plants and a metal fire feature to create a party pad.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Luxury Deck with a Dog Staircase
programme.desc: Newlyweds Whitney and Joey have just purchased their dream home in an exclusive gated community, but the existing deck has some serious issues. It's old, rotting and doesn't fit their needs. Plus, their aging dog is having trouble using the stairs.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cajun Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Texas and Louisiana to feast on classic Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Foods in Jamaica
programme.desc: The search for fire and food takes us to Jamaica where we make a beeline for Scotchies's Too, a restaurant famous for cooking jerk pork and chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations
programme.desc: Michael digs into an incredible one-of-a-kind creation: a deep-fried burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Cake and Cupids Conquer All

programme.title: Choccywoccydoodah: Cake, Sweat and Tiers

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Shower Struggle

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Baker for the Bikers

programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Maximum Venom: Web of Venom
programme.desc: When Spider-Man and Max Modell experiment on a sample of Venom symbiote, it escapes and unleashes a weapon of unknown purpose.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Abracadabra! Wizard Fafnir!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Evolving Research!
DuckTales: The Golden Lagoon of White Agony Plains!
programme.desc: Scrooge reteams with his conniving ex-partner and old flame, Goldie O' Gilt, to find a long-lost golden lagoon, but Glomgold has other plans.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Movie: Born in China
programme.desc: Disneynature brings viewers on a journey into the wilds of China. The documentary follows the adventures of three animal families: the panda, the golden monkey, and the snow leopard, as they share remarkably intimate family moments and dangers.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Natures Wonderland/ Shipped Out/ The Birthday Song
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.desc: After promising Earl she would drop his tax return in the mail, Caroline learns that Max has never filed and gets sidetracked trying to help her.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Trashbox
programme.desc: Keira bids a lot of money on a date with Blue at a charity auction in order to maintain her high-profile image, resulting in a confession that her income isn't as expendable as it used to be.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mike and the Mechanics
programme.desc: To snap Eve out of her funk of not getting into West Point Academy, Mike hopes that taking her to Outdoor Man will show her different career options. But both Mike and Vanessa are taken aback by the unexpected influence that car mechanic Joe has on her.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackée Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: McClung vs. McClung
programme.desc: A woman suspects her younger husband’s suspicious behavior and the fact that he has a dating site profile mean he’s cheating.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Bad Diving Buddy/ Groom Disservice
programme.desc: A woman is injured while scuba diving. Man objects to his friend's wedding night prank.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Friendly Ghost Roommate/ Basket Boozled
programme.desc: Student sues ex-roommate for breach of contract; man sues basketball league.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Update Show: 2 Dads, Double the Doubt
programme.desc: Court is in recess as Judge Lakes revisits outrageous cases where two or more men were accused of possibly fathering a child.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Jelly, Hold the Peanuts/ Graduation Gift ... Not!
programme.desc: Mother sues over child's allergic reaction; Uncle sues niece over graduation gift.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Big Brother to the Rescue
programme.desc: Keke confronts Kiara who's made advances on her boyfriend. Aurea's boyfriend Twaan of five years makes her heart beat but he has plans of dumping her.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff says the defendant is her fiancé’s best friend who spent 14 years in prison for dealing drugs. She’s suing him because she claims he totaled her car. He is countersuing her for emotional distress.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment features the cases 'Not Computing', ' Bad Breeding ', and ' Tenant Tensions'.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Causing damages; not making repairs; grasping at straws over a loan.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Custodian Charging Chump/ Moving Mayhem
programme.desc: Woman sues for breach of contract; tenant sues landlord over moving expenses.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiffs claim they agreed to lend the defendant money to support a fellow minority business owner but they now feel duped.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I May Have a Past But I'm Not a Thief
programme.desc: Natasha accuses her cousin Nia of stealing her rent money. Plus, Samantha suspects that her fiancé Patrick stole money to keep his gay lifestyle secret. Afterwards, Sadie believes her niece Trina stole $800.

programme.title: Maury: Back on Maury 16 Years Later ... Are You Still Cheating?
programme.desc: Anita and Zeffrey are back 16 years after being on the show. Shauna feels like she is being played by her fiancé Davionne and her best friend Demetrius; She is convinced Davionne has been cheating and that Demetrius has been helping him.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Jilted While in Jail
programme.desc: Jamarri wants to know why his girlfriend Iesha stopped coming to visit during his stint in prison. Iesha always had an excuse as to why she couldn’t make it but Jamarri believes there’s more to it.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: The Anxiety You've Never Heard of
programme.desc: Second hand anxiety is a contagious type of anxiety. Mel meets a woman whose stress and anxiety is rubbing off on her family.

programme.title: Movie: One Fine Day
programme.desc: Two busy single parents get to know each other over the course of a mishap-filled day.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: This spoof of patriotic action movies revolves around a team of oblivious paramilitary soldiers, whose high-tech headquarters resides within Mount Rushmore, fighting to keep the world safe from terrorists and activists.

programme.title: Movie: The Ringer
programme.desc: In order to slide out from beneath a mound of debt, a nice young man decides to rig the Special Olympics by posing as a contestant.

programme.title: Movie: Emma

programme.title: Movie: Baby's Day Out

programme.title: Movie: Babe
